info.name: FastAIBooking API
info.description: Postman collection generated from the current FastAIBooking API routes found in the uploaded code archive.

body.raw:
{
  "fullName": "New Owner",
  "email": "new.owner+{{$timestamp}}@example.com",
  "phone": "+15550001111",
  "password": "Owner123!",
  "salon": {
    "name": "New Nail Studio {{$timestamp}}",
    "contactEmail": "contact+{{$timestamp}}@example.com",
    "contactPhone": "+15550002222",
    "timezone": "America/New_York",
    "addressLine1": "100 Main St",
    "city": "Jersey City",
    "state": "NJ",
    "postalCode": "07302",
    "country": "US"
  }
}

request.description: Mobile owner app login. Store data.accessToken and data.refreshToken, then call Notifications / Register Android or iOS FCM Token with Bearer auth.

response.name: Owner login vi-VN

request.description: Mobile staff app login. Store data.accessToken and data.refreshToken, then call Notifications / Register Android or iOS FCM Token with Bearer auth.
Staff mobile app password change. Requires Authorization: Bearer {{staffAccessToken}}.

request.description: Creates staff with owner-provided password and sends login email.
Creates staff without password. Backend generates temporary password and sends login email.
Owner sets a new staff password and backend emails the new password to the staff.
Backend generates a new temporary password and emails it to the staff.
Alias for reset-access. Owner sets a staff password and backend emails it when sendEmail is true.
Deletes/removes a staff member from active usage. Safe for appointment history.
Mobile staff profile endpoint. Requires Authorization: Bearer {{staffAccessToken}} after Staff Login.

item.name: Get Billing Usage With History Limit

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Builder Gel Fill",

}

request.description: Deletes/removes a service from active usage. Safe for appointment history.
Returns all appointments visible to the authenticated user when no query parameters are provided.
Returns a paginated appointment page.
Creates a future owner appointment. The collection pre-request script sets futureAppointmentTime to 2:00 PM America/New_York on a future weekday business-hour example.
Simulates an AI booking with futureAppointmentTime from the collection pre-request script, using salon-local America/New_York business-hour examples.
Reschedules an appointment using rescheduleAppointmentTime from the collection pre-request script, currently 4:00 PM America/New_York on a future weekday.
Mobile app must call this after login and whenever Firebase refreshes the token. Requires Authorization: Bearer <accessToken>. Use platform android.
Call this on mobile app logout or when Firebase rotates/removes the token. Requires Authorization: Bearer <accessToken>.
Fetch the signed-in mobile user notification inbox with Authorization: Bearer <accessToken>.
Fetch unread count for the signed-in mobile user. Refresh this after login, register-token, and mark-read calls.
Mark one notification read for the signed-in mobile user. Set notificationId from Notification Inbox.
Mark all notifications read for the signed-in mobile user.
Mobile app must call this after login and whenever Firebase refreshes the token. Requires Authorization: Bearer <accessToken>. Use platform ios.

item.name: Mobile App API
item.description: Complete mobile app handoff for Kien. Login first, store Bearer token, register FCM token after every login/token refresh or Firebase token refresh.

request.description: Owner app login. Store accessToken/refreshToken and then call Register Android/iOS FCM Token.
Staff app login. Store accessToken/refreshToken and then call Register Android/iOS FCM Token.
Operator app login for call center flows.
Refresh expired access token. After refresh, app should register FCM token again if Firebase token changed.
Logout by refresh token. App should unregister FCM token before or during logout.
Current authenticated user. Use role/salonId/staffId for app bootstrap.
Protected password change for owner/staff/operator.
Request password reset email.
Complete password reset with token from email.
Owner dashboard appointment bootstrap.
Salon profile including timezone.
Update salon name/timezone/phones/address. Include unchanged fields if preserving full profile.
Booking, AI, call center and notification settings.
Update salon business settings.
Business hours are salon-local.
Replace weekly business hours.
Owner staff list. Response includes serviceIds and assignedServices summary.
Creates staff with owner-provided password and sends login email.
Creates staff without password. Backend generates temporary password and sends login email.
Create staff login and exact service mapping. Staff create may include password for manual setup or omit it for a generated temporary password sent by email.
Update staff details and optionally replace exact assigned serviceIds.
Owner reads every salon service with assigned=true/false for one staff.
Owner replaces staff-service mapping exactly. Staff cannot call this endpoint.
Owner resets staff login. Use password for manual mode or omit password for generated temporary password. Backend emails the new password when sendEmail is true.
Deactivate staff and login access.
Reactivate staff and login access.
Owner sets a new staff password and backend emails the new password to the staff.
Backend generates a new temporary password and emails it to the staff.
Alias for reset-access. Owner sets a staff password and backend emails it when sendEmail is true.
Deletes/removes a staff member from active usage. Safe for appointment history.
List services and service-centric staff mappings.
Create service with optional staffIds mapping.
Edit service.
Existing service-centric mapping endpoint. Kept consistent with staff-centric endpoints.
Deletes/removes a service from active usage. Safe for appointment history.
Search/list customers.
Create customer.
Customer detail.
Customer appointment history.
Owner appointment list.
Send startTime as UTC ISO. Business hours are salon-local.
Appointment detail.
Reschedule appointment with UTC ISO startTime.
Cancel appointment.
List available slots. Date is salon-local YYYY-MM-DD.
Validate a UTC ISO appointment startTime.
Owner billing usage.
Owner alerts.
Owner call logs.
Owner AI interaction logs.
Staff bootstrap profile. Includes user, staff, salon timezone/name, serviceIds, assignedServices.
Staff updates own profile.
Staff reads active services they can perform.
Staff reminders.
Staff sees assigned appointments only.
Staff can read assigned appointment detail only.
Staff can only update status or notes on assigned appointments.
Start appointment work.
Extend work time.
Complete work.
Staff message thread with owner.
Staff sends message to owner.
Amazon Connect/operator runtime config.
Salons assigned to operator.
Selected salon detail/context.
Staff for selected salon.
Services for selected salon.
Customers for selected salon.
Operator creates customer in assigned salon.
Appointments for selected salon.
Operator creates appointment for assigned salon.
Waiting calls.
Queue item detail.
Accept waiting call.
Update operator notes.
Create callback request.
Attach voicemail metadata.
Send SMS fallback.
Complete waiting call.
App must call this after login and whenever Firebase token refreshes.
Register iOS Firebase token after login/token refresh.
Call on logout or token removal.
Signed-in user inbox.
Signed-in user unread count.
Mark one notification read.
Mark all signed-in user notifications read.

exec: const localAsUtc = Date.UTC(Number(parts.year), Number(parts.month) - 1, Number(parts.day), Number(parts.hour), Number(parts.minute), Number(parts.second));
